context: Agent must produce a vite.config.ts for a React Nx app with the correct plugin setup, workspace-relative paths, and server configuration.

checklist.name: nxViteTsPaths imported and included in plugins
checklist.description: The config imports nxViteTsPaths from @nx/vite/plugins/nx-tsconfig-paths.plugin and calls nxViteTsPaths() in the plugins array.

checklist.name: react() plugin included
checklist.description: The config imports react from @vitejs/plugin-react and calls react() in the plugins array.

checklist.name: root: __dirname set
checklist.description: The config sets root: __dirname at the top-level of defineConfig.

checklist.name: cacheDir uses workspace-relative path
checklist.description: cacheDir is set to "../../node_modules/.vite/apps/web-app" (not a project-relative path).
